chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-128 of 2016. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON'BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 'A'. 2. For orders on statement dt. 11.03.2016' 3. For Hearing of main case. Mr. Khadim Hussain Khooharo, Addl' P. G. Through listed statement, the petitioner No. 1, does not press this petition on the ground that his grievances has been redressed. It appears that this petition was filed by the petitioners seeking directions for respondent No.7, to lurnish whereabouts of missing person, namely, Nisar Ahmed Mirani, who is son of the petitioner No. 1. Subsequently the olficial respondents No.7, i.e. SHO PS Mirpur Buriro of District Jacobabad filecl his statement to the effect that the said missing son of the petitioner No. 1, is arrested in Crime No.04/2016, registered under section 324, 353, 399, 149, PPC at Police Station Mirpur Buriro, thercfore, the grievances of the petitioner appear to be redressed. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed, along with listed application, as not pressed by the petitioner No' 1 and as the grievances of the rest ol the petitioners appear to be redressed. Judge 4\ 18.10.2017
